summary: Opt-in evidence repository write seam delivered. convergence_evidence_seam.py implements ConvergenceRepoSeam.from_policy() (disabled unless SANGUO_RAG_CONVERGENCE_REPO_ENABLED=1). Seam writes evidence_cards + source_runs per round, pipeline_runs on run completion. All errors go to _convergence-repo-error-ledger.jsonl; loop never aborts. run_full_roster_convergence_loop.py patched at 3 injection points with 0 breaking changes to canonical defaults. Smoke 6/6 pass.
expectedEvidence: smoke fixture proving default canonical behavior is unchanged

artifacts.description: ConvergenceRepoSeam class. from_policy() reads policy-convergence-evidence-repo.json + env vars. write_round() coerces evidence_cards + source_runs; write_run_summary() coerces pipeline_runs. All errors logged to error ledger, never abort. close() is idempotent.

3 injection points: (1) _build_convergence_repo_seam() helper after imports; (2) evidence_repo_seam instantiation after rounds=[]; (3) write_round() call before rounds.append(); (4) write_run_summary()+close() after summary JSON written.
6 tests: disabled-by-default, enabled-dry-run, write-round-dry-run (card_written=3), write-run-summary-dry-run, no-jsonl-side-effects, close-idempotent. All pass.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Writer seam sends rows to EvidenceRepository only when opt-in enabled
acceptanceMapping.evidence: ConvergenceRepoSeam.from_policy(): enabled=False when SANGUO_RAG_CONVERGENCE_REPO_ENABLED!=1; test disabled-by-default PASS

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Default execution JSONL canonical; zero PostgreSQL writes without opt-in
acceptanceMapping.evidence: test no-jsonl-side-effects PASS; _state/ dir not created in dry-run postgres mode

acceptanceMapping.criterion: All no-write / dry-run paths produce zero repository side effects
Repository errors captured in error ledger, not abort
acceptanceMapping.evidence: _append_error_ledger() called on exception; continueOnError=true; loop write_round() wrapped in try/except

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0603: integrate EvidenceManifest writing and resume scan into convergence loop
